claims.summary: Dynamic noise and adaptive pressure are review candidates not wired into ESN::step.
claims.disposition: Verified current source states and tests this boundary explicitly.

claims.summary: Review behavior may drift from actual reservoir behavior.
claims.disposition: Verified as an architectural gap made visible by separate review authority and unwired-helper tests; no review receipt is treated as live behavior.

claims.summary: Pressure-room boundaries and non-finite inputs require direct safety tests.
claims.disposition: Verified smooth-knee, reported-point, continuity, NaN fallback, and bounded-room tests pass in both Minime targets.

claims.summary: Dynamic noise should be migrated into the active ESN loop.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 reservoir mathematics and exploration-noise authority.
